title: Companion — Palimpsest Floor
medium: generative art — a procedural wall that crosses, in real time, from plaster through signature, texture, and finally substrate. marks accumulate. occasional buffs clear patches. the phase transition is the point.
caption: A single tag is a signature. A hundred tags is a texture. And somewhere in between, the thing stops being a wall and starts being a substrate — on a week nobody records.
